name: ShotGrid MCP Server
what_it_does: ShotGrid (formerly Shotgun, now Autodesk Flow Production Tracking) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the industry-standard VFX/animation production tracking platform — querying shots, assets, tasks, and versions; updating production status; managing review workflows; tracking render progress; and integrating production pipeline data into agent-driven VFX studio workflows.
use_cases: Querying shot status and production progress from VFX coordination agents
Updating task status and versions from pipeline automation agents
Managing review and approval workflows from production coordination agents
Tracking asset dependencies and shot lists from production planning agents
Automating dailies and client review setup from pipeline TD agents
Generating production reports from analytics agents
not_for: Teams not using Autodesk ShotGrid/Flow Production Tracking for VFX/animation production
General project management (use Jira, Asana, or Linear MCPs for non-VFX workflows)
Small studios without ShotGrid licenses (ShotGrid is expensive enterprise software)
best_when: A VFX or animation studio using ShotGrid needs AI-assisted production tracking — querying shot status, automating status updates, and integrating production data into pipeline tools.
avoid_when: You don't use ShotGrid/Flow Production Tracking. For other VFX pipeline tools (ftrack, Kitsu, NIM), use those platforms' specific integrations.

auth.notes: ShotGrid Script Key (API key) or OAuth2 for user-level access. Requires SHOTGRID_URL (your studio's ShotGrid URL), SHOTGRID_SCRIPT_NAME, and SHOTGRID_SCRIPT_KEY or OAuth tokens. Studio-specific URL required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ShotGrid requires paid Autodesk subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Autodesk Flow Production Tracking subscription required; pricing by seat (enterprise)
pricing.notes: ShotGrid (Flow Production Tracking) is enterprise VFX production software with significant per-seat costs. API access is included in subscription. MCP server is free open source from loonghao (active VFX pipeline developer).

performance.rate_limits: ShotGrid API rate limits apply; generally generous for studio use

known_agent_gotchas: ShotGrid requires studio-specific URL — no generic endpoint; each studio has own instance
ShotGrid data model is complex (Projects, Shots, Assets, Tasks, Versions) — learn the schema
Script keys have full API access — scope carefully or use OAuth for user-level permissions
ShotGrid API has quirks with filter syntax — test queries against dev/staging before production
Community MCP from active VFX pipeline developer — higher quality but not official Autodesk
ShotGrid is transitioning branding to Flow Production Tracking — some docs use old name
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. Script key or OAuth2 auth. Studio-specific ShotGrid instance. Production data includes client deliverables and proprietary VFX content — handle credentials carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Script key or OAuth2. VFX production data is studio confidential. Scope script permissions to minimum needed. Not an official Autodesk MCP.
